title: Safe local live contradiction-detection probe CLI
problem: Tickets 061-063 proved report-only live claim extraction, concept linking, and relationship drafting. detect-contradictions still requires persisted claims, relationships, and SQLite writes for qualification evidence. Operators need a no-DB live probe for contradiction detection before any graph persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Live probe with qwen2.5:7b yields accepted_count >= 1 on default contradiction bundle fixture.
db_writes remains false; report under data/reports/live_probes/.
validate_contradiction_candidates unchanged; GT07 still passes mock-only.
Rejected live probe rows include validation_diagnostic notes.
Mock/default pytest and CI remain green without Ollama.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-detect-contradictions with ollama opt-in
non_goals: Do not persist qualification evidence or relationship metadata to default DB or public exports.
Do not add OpenAI/OpenRouter or API keys.
Do not weaken contradiction validation rules.
rollback_plan: Revert CLI, probe helper, prompt calibration, fixtures, and tests. No schema migrations.
